claim_boundary: 该配置只描述第三方官方资源能否在 Colab 自动获得或自动生成 official bundle, 不生成分数, 不替代 measured_formal records。

required_public_or_user_resources: ModelScope text-to-video model or Stable Video Diffusion model
official generated wm_info.bin and watermarked frames/video, or native official command output
resource_rows.reason_automatic_bundle_not_supported: VideoShield detection depends on watermark generation maintained info and latent inversion under its supported video model; generating this fairly for every SSTW prompt is a separate official baseline generation run.
resource_rows.strict_gate_resolution: provide SSTW_VIDEOSHIELD_NATIVE_EVAL_COMMAND or official result bundle

required_public_or_user_resources: 48GB CPU memory and high-memory GPU; README recommends single GPU memory >=50GB, A100-40GB only with text encoder quantization
resource_rows.reason_automatic_bundle_not_supported: official README states the recommended runtime memory exceeds Colab L4; forcing an L4 run would be an unreliable paper baseline path.
resource_rows.strict_gate_resolution: run official SIGMark on suitable GPU and provide official result bundle

required_public_or_user_resources: ground-truth bits generated by official generation script
resource_rows.reason_automatic_bundle_not_supported: official README requires trained decoder and extractor weights but does not provide public weights in the repository.
resource_rows.strict_gate_resolution: provide SSTW_SPDMARK_EXTRACTOR_PATH + SSTW_SPDMARK_GT_BITS_PATH, native command, or official result bundle generated after official training

required_public_or_user_resources: PRC keys generated by official PRC_key_gen.py
resource_rows.reason_automatic_bundle_not_supported: official protocol generates watermarked videos and temporal_results under its own model and key schedule; full automatic fair bundle generation is a separate official run.
resource_rows.strict_gate_resolution: provide SSTW_VIDEOMARK_NATIVE_EVAL_COMMAND or official temporal_results bundle

required_public_or_user_resources: official frame arrays generated by Video-Signature or equivalent official pipeline
resource_rows.reason_automatic_bundle_not_supported: checkpoint is public, but official detection is meaningful on videos/frame arrays produced by the Video-Signature pipeline; arbitrary SSTW videos do not contain this signature.
resource_rows.strict_gate_resolution: auto-download decoder when allowed, then provide official frame-array/result bundle or native command
SSTW can generate an official VideoSeal bundle from SSTW runtime source videos by calling the official API
